questions.question: Humans are social beings. We cannot live alone and need support from others. We should try to do things in cooperation. When we work as a team, we can be more successful. Helen Keller once said, “Alone we can do so little; together we can do so much.” None of us is as smart as all of us. When we keep this in mind, I’m sure that we will 	a better society.
